$comment: Canonical stack-family mapping for repo-harness. A-F are core stack families. G-J are sidecar/runtime presets. K is fully custom.

quickDefaults.PROHIBITIONS:
- No `any` in production code
- No `console.log` in production code
- Always present 2-3 options with trade-offs at ambiguous decision points
- Always push back on requests that violate project rules

defaultTemplateVariables.TECH_STACK_TABLE:
| Frontend shell | Astro + TypeScript |
| UI | Astro islands + shadcn/Radix-compatible components where React is needed |
| Deploy | Cloudflare Pages/Workers or Node adapter |
| Data | Postgres/Supabase or SQLite/Turso by workload |

| Frontend app | Vite 8 + React + TypeScript |
| Routing/data | TanStack Router + TanStack Query |
| UI | shadcn/Radix-style components + Tailwind CSS |
| Data authority | Postgres/Supabase by default; SQLite/Turso for lightweight edge/local-first work |

C.name: Full-stack React only when needed
C.stack: TanStack Start or React Router Framework Mode

defaultTemplateVariables.TECH_STACK_TABLE:
| Full-stack React | TanStack Start or React Router Framework Mode |
| SSR/actions | Use only when server functions, actions, or streaming are required |
| UI/data | React + TanStack Query + shadcn/Radix-style UI |
| Non-default | Next.js is not the default recommendation |

| Workspace | Bun Workspaces, optional Turborepo only at scale |
| Apps | Astro shell, Vite app, Expo companion, or admin surfaces |
| Services | Hono gateways, workers, and sidecars |
| Shared packages | contracts, ui, data access, tool adapters, test fixtures |

E.name: Cloudflare edge web stack
E.stack: Cloudflare Pages/Workers + R2/KV/Queues/Durable Objects + external SQL

defaultTemplateVariables.TECH_STACK_TABLE:
| Edge web | Cloudflare Pages + Workers |
| Cloudflare storage | R2, KV, Queues, Durable Objects, Hyperdrive when useful |
| SQL authority | Postgres/Supabase or SQLite/Turso; D1 is opt-in only |
| Agent runtime | VPS behind Hono when Node APIs, tools, or long-lived workers are required |

F.name: Mobile/realtime companion
F.stack: Expo Router + React Native New Architecture + NativeWind

defaultTemplateVariables.TECH_STACK_TABLE:
| Mobile | Expo Router + React Native New Architecture |
| Styling | NativeWind when useful |
| State | TanStack Query + Zustand |
| Backend | Shared Hono/API boundary, Supabase/Postgres, or realtime/media sidecar |

| Python runtime | uv + FastAPI or Pydantic AI |
| Data/research | DuckDB + Polars + artifact storage |
| App boundary | Hono gateway owns auth, run IDs, tools, and approvals |
| UI | Vite/assistant-ui report or runtime console when user-visible |

H.name: Go high-concurrency/financial sidecar
H.stack: Go/Gin sidecar + Hono gateway + TypeScript app

defaultTemplateVariables.TECH_STACK_TABLE:
| Go sidecar | Go/Gin or narrow Go workers |
| Best fit | Market data, FIX/RFQ, fan-out, infra adapters, high-concurrency jobs |
| App gateway | Hono owns product-facing contracts and auth |
| Data | Postgres/Supabase for authority; queues/streams by capability |

| SQL | SQLite, Turso/libSQL, or embedded local stores |
| Sync | Turso Sync for new local-first sync work; explicit replication, conflict, and ownership contracts |
| Local-first | Loro/CRDT only when collaborative document state requires it |
| Gateway | Hono or existing app API boundary |

| Rust sidecar | Parsers, indexing, sandboxing, native kernels, low-latency tools |
| Interface | MCP tools or narrow HTTP jobs behind Hono |
| UI | OpenTUI/Ink or Vite IDE surface when needed |
| Constraint | Use only when the team can support Rust operational complexity |
| Stack | Custom composition of A-J families |\n| Constraints | Defined during guided Q&A |
